name: Low Cal Strawberry Chiffon Pie
recipeIngredient: 20 oz Kool-Aid Unsweetened Drink Mix (strawberry flavor)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine water and gelatin in a bowl. Let set for 5 minutes until dissolved.
2. Heat the mixture gently until the gelatin is fully melted.
3. Add Kool-Aid drink mix and sweetener to the gelatin mixture. Stir well.
4. Refrigerate until slightly thickened, about 30 minutes.
5. Prepare the whipped topping while the gelatin is cooling.
6. Chill both the gelatin mixture and whipped topping in the refrigerator.
7. Once the gelatin is set, add instant dry milk powder and whip at high speed until creamy and stiff.
8. Gently fold in the whipped topping into the chilled gelatin mixture.
9. Spread the filling evenly over the prepared Graham Cracker Crust.
10. Garnish each serving with a fresh strawberry, placing one in the center of the pie.
11. Refrigerate until firm before cutting into 8 equal pieces.
Per Serving (1/8 of Pie): CAL 125; CHO 15 gm; PRO 3 gm; FAT 7 gm; NA 122 mg
Food exchanges per serving: 1 Bread, 1 Fat Source
